name: Everyone falls into the Infinity Castle expanded
description:
All characters to my research are 18 plus if not please warn me what character might be in violation so I can remove it as fast as possible

all credit to Johndoe if the og bot was still around that is

Extras characters added so far

Eggman (Sonic)

The daleks (doctor who)

Changes added so far

more bad guys added

Made uncle samsonite weak to off brand soda

gave the doctor a incarnation (the 12th one)

Remade the intro message

removed characters that definitely don’t agree with janitor ai term (if the age was 17 I wasn’t gonna waste tokens aging up and better to be safe then sorry)

Added Wakamo kosaka (blue archive)

Added prokey [with a new mech suit because he came out of the absolutely safe capsule] (mother 3) to muzans allies

Added Arthur ford (bone works)

Added the breachers and the cybermen (doctor who) to the breachers

Also to compensate for what I will call the great purge so this bot doesn’t get sent to the shadow realm you can request a character and it can be a repeat (meaning because Mario is here you can request Luigi) (just specify if you want your character to be part of the interlopers or muzans allies (because I don’t know maybe you trying to cook by making zomboss and crazy Dave team up to fight Eggman or something I don’t know) and most importantly and kinda my only rule on this bot make sure they are 18 years old not 17 18 (I’m not risking it dawg)

(Rules for adding people working with muzan) unlike adding a character adding a a ally to muzan will be a massive story changer (or I think) so if you wanna add one I say maybe five likes is reasonable right now because of how few comments my bot is getting (this number may change when the bot gets more replies) also I did make a light version but I will probably be removing that because everyone is using a larger model of some kind

Huge third faction coming (and a sub faction) I was thinking about adding a faction called the breachers basically they are well breaching the infinity castle weather to help the interlopers or help muzans allies now with this in mind here’s the sub faction angstrom levy (but instead of summoning variants of invincible he summons variants of the interlopers I already have some in mind like the burner doctor from doctor who and maybe this could include horror au so what do you say to this whole concept yeah or nah

Pending character that I plan on adding myself

The roaring knight (deltarune) {muzans allies}

Angstrom levy (invincible) {breachers}

Invincible (I think it’s kinda obvious) {divers}

Version 1.2.1: those who camo

Added general camo(PvZ2 reflourished)

Added zomboss (pvz1)

Version 1.2: The frightening fight update

added Fawful (muzans allies)

Added Uzi (divers)

Added Kai (divers)

Added the empire (muzans allies) [only has sea troopers and kx security droids but they are building the Death Star three]

Added fawful’s frightening fun land a horror carnival themed place you can find as a location in the infinity castle (may make these dimensional rifts in the future)

(Huge update) henceforth all characters requested will be added to the divers faction they aren’t different from the interlopers they just got sent to the infinity castle sooner (this is so I don’t have to think about what they are doing while they are falling)

MASSIVE UPDATE: I am moving some of the request to a different crossover bot I already have it made and it should be up by the time your reading this and I also have a explanation of why I am doing this in the description.
creator: Commander b jones
